operational_knowledge_units.title: Map Monitor message panel provides robot and AGV status and fault access
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Map Monitor Message Panel is a UI area that can be opened to view counts of active robots, robots charging, AGVs disconnected, and to access AGV fault information, fault inspection details, AGV location, and system E-stop control.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'Drop down to show AGV faults'
Bullet: 'Inspection to view details of fault'

relationships.target: fault inspection and locating a faulted AGV

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Map Monitor Message Panel UI concept. Open the message panel to view count of active robots, count of robots charging, AGV faults from a drop-down, count of AGVs disconnected, inspection details for a fault, ability to locate a faulted AGV, and E-stop the system.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Message panel supports AGV fault review and localization
operational_knowledge_units.summary: Within the message panel, AGV fault handling includes a drop-down to show AGV faults, an inspection function to view fault details, and a locate function for the faulted AGV.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'Drop down to show AGV faults'
Bullet: 'Inspection to view details of fault'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: AGV fault diagnostic concept in Map Monitor Message Panel: show AGV faults from a drop-down, inspect to view fault details, and locate the faulted AGV.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Open the message panel and review AGV fault information
preconditions: User is in the Map Monitor screen.
Message Panel is available in the UI.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide lists Message Panel actions and information available in Map Monitor, including opening the panel, fault drop-down, inspection, locating a faulted AGV, and counts for robot and AGV states.

steps.instruction: Open the message panel in Map Monitor.
Use the drop-down to show AGV faults.
steps.validation_check: Confirm AGV faults are shown in the panel.

steps.instruction: Inspect a fault to view its details.
steps.expected_outcome: Fault detail information is shown for the selected fault.

steps.instruction: Locate the faulted AGV from the message panel.
steps.expected_outcome: The selected faulted AGV is located in the interface.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the UI indicates the faulted AGV location.
steps.visual_region_hint: Message Panel locate faulted AGV control

warnings: The slide also mentions 'E stop the system' but does not provide an explicit action sequence; no E-stop procedure is extracted from this slide.
UI control names and exact interaction details are not shown beyond the listed bullets.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Diagnostic check candidate for Map Monitor Message Panel: open the message panel, use the drop-down to show AGV faults, inspect fault details, and locate the faulted AGV.
